description: Manage workspace membership: invite, change roles, revoke access, audit log.

userStories.title: Invite member by email
userStories.description: As admin, invite a member by email so they receive onboarding link.
acceptanceCriteria: Invite endpoint validates email and creates pending member record
Invite sends email with invite link

userStories.title: Change member role
userStories.description: As admin, change a member's role between viewer, editor, admin.
acceptanceCriteria: Role change endpoint updates role and enforces permissions
Role change recorded in audit log

userStories.title: Revoke workspace access
userStories.description: As admin, revoke a member's access immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Revoke endpoint disables access and invalidates sessions/tokens

userStories.title: Record membership changes in audit log and surface recent changes
userStories.description: As admin, see recent membership changes in workspace settings page with audit details.
acceptanceCriteria: Membership changes (invite, role change, revoke) are persisted in audit log
Workspace settings page lists recent membership changes with timestamp and actor
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
